message:
test(transport): add E2E HTTP tests and close bd-2kv epic [bd-3fq1, bd-2kv]

HTTP E2E tests (bd-3fq1):
- Request/response flow with full HTTP parsing
- Error status codes and error responses
- Content-type handling (JSON, charset)
- CORS preflight and origin validation
- Streaming transport push/pop
- Session lifecycle with expiration
- Cancellation and close handling
- Body size limit enforcement

Closes epic bd-2kv (E2E: Transport Layer Tests) with all child tasks:
- bd-swyn: Stdio NDJSON tests
- bd-1pua: SSE streaming tests
- bd-2gyv: WebSocket tests
- bd-3fq1: HTTP tests

All 22 HTTP tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
